body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/customFile/updateStatus 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/customFile/updateStatus 
 ## 接口描述 
更新自定义档案的状态，0-关闭，1-开启 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%200-%E5%85%B3%E9%97%AD%EF%BC%8C1-%E5%BC%80%E5%90%AF","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileId","required":true,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"CUS0000","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}],"open":false}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 {BaseURL}/v1/customFile/updateStatus?status=string&customFileId=CUS0000
### 请求示例
```
{}
```
### 返回示例
```
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 

| **错误码** | **错误描述** | **备注** |
| ---------- | ------------ | -------- |
| 200        | 成功         | 无      |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/customFile/updateStatus

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/customFile/updateStatus

接口描述

更新自定义档案的状态，0-关闭，1-开启

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"status","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%200-%E5%85%B3%E9%97%AD%EF%BC%8C1-%E5%BC%80%E5%90%AF","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFileId","required":true,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"CUS0000","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}],"open":false}]}

接口调用示例

{BaseURL}/v1/customFile/updateStatus?status=string&customFileId=CUS0000

请求示例

{}

返回示例

{
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
200 成功 无
